title: Koanophyllon monanthum
intro: Koanophyllon monanthum, also known as Mexican feather fern or Wild Hair, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant has been found to possess several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which make it a promising natural remedy for various ailments. Koanophyllon monanthum contains bioactive constituents such as flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. taxonomy: Koanophyllon monanthum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Koanophyllon, which is a group of plants endemic to Central and South America. The plant is further categorized into the subfamily Vernonioideae and the tribe Vernonieae.
